funny.b: Always have to speak only in questions

funny.a: Have fingers as long as your legs
funny.b: Have legs as short as your fingers

funny.a: Sneeze every time you laugh

funny.a: Always have to sing instead of talking
funny.b: Always have to dance instead of walking

funny.a: Be covered in fur like a dog
funny.b: Have a full set of scales like a fish

funny.a: Sweat maple syrup
funny.b: Have teeth that fall out and immediately grow back

funny.a: Only be able to eat soup with your hands
funny.b: Eat all solid food with a spoon

funny.a: Have to wear a cape everywhere
funny.b: Wear a tuxedo everywhere for the rest of your life

funny.a: Laugh uncontrollably for 10 minutes every morning
funny.b: Cry uncontrollably for 2 minutes at random moments throughout the day

funny.a: Never be able to use a smartphone again
funny.b: Never be able to watch TV or any video content again

funny.a: Have a pet dog that argues with everything you say
funny.b: Have a cat that silently judges every decision you make

funny.a: Live without music
funny.b: Live without movies and TV

funny.a: Have hiccups every time you're nervous
funny.b: Sneeze every time you hear your own name

funny.a: Always feel like you're slightly drunk
funny.b: Always feel slightly car sick

funny.a: Have to hop everywhere instead of walking
funny.b: Have to spin in a circle before entering any room

funny.a: Only eat food that's the colour blue
funny.b: Only eat food that smells like feet

funny.a: Be able to talk to animals but they're all rude
funny.b: Be able to speak every human language but animals all ignore you

funny.a: Have a rewind button for your day
funny.b: Have a pause button that freezes time for 30 seconds

funny.a: Always say what you're thinking with no filter
funny.b: Never be able to say what you're actually thinking

hard.a: Know the exact date of your death but not the cause
hard.b: Know the cause of your death but not when it happens

hard.a: Be famous but completely broke
hard.b: Be enormously wealthy but completely unknown

hard.a: Lose all your memories from the past 10 years
hard.b: Be unable to form any new long-term memories for the next 10 years

hard.a: Always tell the truth no matter the consequence
hard.b: Never be able to tell the truth about anything

hard.a: Have true love and no money your entire life
hard.b: Have all the money you could want but never find love

hard.a: Work a job you despise for twice the money
hard.b: Work a job you love for half the money

hard.a: Lose your sense of sight
hard.b: Lose your sense of hearing

hard.a: Give up the internet for five years
hard.b: Give up all hot food and drink for the rest of your life

hard.a: Know everything about your partner's past
hard.b: Start completely fresh with your partner and never know anything about their history

hard.a: Be brilliant but deeply socially isolated
hard.b: Have the best social life imaginable but be of average intelligence

hard.a: Have a guaranteed happy short life ending at 55
hard.b: Have an uncertain long life that could reach 90 but might end sooner

hard.a: Save 10 strangers by doing one terrible thing you'll regret forever
hard.b: Do nothing and let the 10 strangers face their fate

hard.a: Be respected but not liked
hard.b: Be liked but not respected

hard.a: Never be able to apologise for anything
hard.b: Never be able to forgive anyone for anything

hard.a: Outlive all your close friends and family by 20 years
hard.b: Die 20 years before everyone you love

hard.a: Know which of your friends secretly dislikes you
hard.b: Never know but always wonder

hard.a: Discover your closest friend has been lying to you for years about something small
hard.b: Never find out but always feel like something is slightly off

hard.a: Spend a year alone on a deserted island
hard.b: Spend a year in a small apartment with someone you find deeply annoying

hard.a: Be stuck in traffic for one hour every single day
hard.b: Spend 30 minutes in a very slow queue every single day

hard.a: Have unlimited talent but no motivation
hard.b: Have unlimited motivation but average talent at everything

deep.a: Live forever and watch everyone you love grow old and die
deep.b: Live a normal lifespan and die alongside the people you love

deep.a: Have the ability to fix your biggest past mistake
deep.b: See a 10-second clip of your future at any moment you choose

deep.a: Be remembered after death as someone great but misunderstood while alive
deep.b: Be beloved during your life but completely forgotten after you die

deep.a: Know all the answers but be unable to share them with anyone
deep.b: Spend your life searching for answers you never fully find

deep.a: Have a life full of adventure and chaos
deep.b: Have a life of quiet stability and deep contentment

deep.a: Fall in love with someone who can never love you back
deep.b: Never experience romantic love at all

deep.a: Know exactly what your life's purpose is but be unable to pursue it
deep.b: Pursue anything you want freely but never know what your purpose is

deep.a: Have one true, deep friendship in your life
deep.b: Have dozens of good but shallow friendships

deep.a: See the world as it really is — imperfect, uncertain, and hard
deep.b: Live happily inside comforting illusions that aren't real

deep.a: Have the power to change one historical event
deep.b: Have the power to prevent one future event
Know the exact moment when your life is about to change forever

deep.a: Spend your life helping others at some cost to your own happiness
deep.b: Pursue your own happiness even if it occasionally comes at a cost to others

deep.a: Always be an outsider who sees the world clearly
deep.b: Fit in perfectly but miss what everyone else misses

deep.a: Have every day be exactly the same but fulfilling
deep.b: Have constant change and variety but never feel fully settled

kids.a: Be able to fly
kids.b: Be able to breathe underwater

kids.b: Have a pet unicorn

kids.a: Live in a treehouse
kids.b: Live on a houseboat

kids.a: Be able to talk to animals
kids.b: Be able to speak every language in the world

kids.a: Have super speed
kids.b: Have super strength

kids.a: Go to school with your favourite movie character
kids.b: Have your favourite character visit you at home

kids.a: Have the ability to time travel

kids.a: Have a magic backpack that always has what you need
kids.b: Have shoes that always take you exactly where you want to go

kids.a: Be best friends with a giant friendly dinosaur
kids.b: Be best friends with a tiny but very smart alien

kids.a: Live inside your favourite video game
kids.b: Live inside your favourite movie

kids.a: Always have perfect weather wherever you go
kids.b: Never need to sleep and have extra hours every day

kids.a: Have a robot do your homework
kids.b: Have a robot do all your chores

kids.a: Shrink to the size of an ant whenever you want
kids.b: Grow to the size of a building whenever you want

kids.a: Only eat sweet food for the rest of your life
kids.b: Only eat savoury food for the rest of your life

kids.a: Be invisible for one day
kids.b: Read minds for one day

kids.a: Have a private pool in your garden
kids.b: Have your own private cinema at home

kids.a: Know every card trick in the world
kids.b: Know every magic word that makes wishes come true

kids.a: Find a treasure chest full of gold
kids.b: Find a treasure chest full of every toy you've ever wanted

kids.a: Never have to go to bed
kids.b: Never have to go to school

couples.a: Take one big dream trip together
couples.b: Take 10 small trips to different places over the same time

couples.a: Live in a busy city together
couples.b: Live in a quiet countryside with your partner

couples.a: Know everything about your partner's past
couples.b: Have a complete clean slate and know nothing about each other's history

couples.a: Have a partner who always agrees with you
couples.b: Have a partner who challenges almost everything you say

couples.a: Share every hobby with your partner
couples.b: Have completely separate interests and activities

couples.a: Have alone time whenever you need it
couples.b: Never need alone time and always prefer your partner near

couples.a: Spend more money on experiences together
couples.b: Spend more money building a comfortable home together

couples.a: Have a partner who is your best friend but there is little romantic passion
couples.b: Have a deeply passionate relationship with much less day-to-day friendship
Have your partner know your every thought

couples.a: Have matching life goals but very different personalities
couples.b: Have matching personalities but very different life goals

couples.a: Have a partner who remembers every important date perfectly
couples.b: Have a partner who forgets dates but always shows up when it matters most

couples.a: Live near your family and support network
couples.b: Live far from family but just the two of you

couples.a: Have a partner who is very affectionate but quite messy
couples.b: Have a partner who is immaculate but shows little physical affection
Have defined areas of life each of you fully controls independently

couples.a: Never argue but also never say hard things that need to be said
couples.b: Argue openly about everything but always resolve it fully

work.a: Work remotely from anywhere in the world
work.b: Work in the most incredible in-person office you can imagine

work.a: Have a brilliant boss who never gives feedback
work.b: Have a poor boss who gives extremely detailed feedback on everything

work.a: Do the same task you are great at every single day
work.b: Rotate through new challenges you find genuinely difficult

work.a: Earn 20 percent more at a job you find average
work.b: Earn the same amount at a job you genuinely love

work.a: Work alone on one big project
work.b: Collaborate with a team on a smaller one

work.a: Have complete job security with limited upward growth
work.b: Have unlimited growth potential with no job stability
Have a difficult one-on-one conversation with your manager

work.a: Have a long commute to a great job
work.b: Have a short commute to an average job

work.a: Work a four-day week with longer daily hours
work.b: Work a standard five-day week with shorter daily hours

work.a: Have a brilliant mentor who is rarely available
work.b: Have an average mentor who is always there when you need them

work.a: Get credit for other people's work by accident
work.b: Have your own best work attributed to someone else

work.a: Be the most productive person on a struggling team
work.b: Be the least productive person on a high-performing team

work.a: Have full creative control with a tiny budget
work.b: Have an unlimited budget but creative decisions made above you

work.a: Know your job is totally secure for the next 10 years
work.b: Know you could be made redundant at any moment but paid double

work.a: Lead a team that dislikes you but delivers great results
work.b: Lead a team that loves you but consistently underdelivers

dark.a: Find out your whole life so far was a vivid dream and you wake up at age 10 with no memory of it
dark.b: Find out your life is being watched live by millions of people who know everything about you

dark.a: Lose all photos from your life
dark.b: Lose all music from your life forever

dark.a: Have everyone forget your birthday for the rest of your life
dark.b: Have everyone remember your birthday but never celebrate it

dark.a: Find out you were adopted at age 30
dark.b: Find out your sibling was adopted and your parents never told either of you

dark.a: Never be able to apologise for anything
dark.b: Never be able to forgive anyone for anything

dark.a: Outlive all your friends by 20 years
dark.b: Be the first person in your friend group to die

dark.a: Know which of your closest friends secretly dislikes you
dark.b: Never know but always feel something is slightly off

dark.a: Have everyone in your life be honest with you about every hard thing they think
dark.b: Have everyone be polite but never truly honest about anything

dark.a: Discover the person you trust most has been lying to you for years about something small
dark.b: Never find out but carry a quiet feeling for the rest of your life that something isn't right

dark.a: Re-live the most painful day of your life once a year
dark.b: Never be able to remember your happiest memory ever again

dark.a: Always feel like you're being watched even when you're not
dark.b: Always feel like you're invisible even in a room full of people

dark.a: Have one hour of your worst memories played back to you publicly
dark.b: Have one hour of your most embarrassing private moments read aloud to people you respect

dark.a: Give up all social media forever
dark.b: Give up in-person social events forever

dark.a: Be the only person alive who can see ghosts
dark.b: Be the only person alive who cannot see ghosts when everyone else can

dark.a: Know the exact moment your relationship will end before it begins
dark.b: Fall into every relationship with no warning and no preparation for how it ends
